response.justification: The candidate has a robust background in full-stack web development, backend microservices, and general software engineering, but completely lacks the specialized hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization experience required for this Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Meets the baseline educational and chronological experience requirement with a BS in Computer Science and well over 8 years of technical experience.
Strong background in low-latency backend systems and systems programming languages like C, C++, and DLang.
Demonstrated leadership and architectural skills in building scalable platforms and microservices from the ground up.
concerns: No demonstrated experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks expertise in performance analysis and optimization for deep learning workloads and AI hardware accelerators.
No background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or hardware power-optimization trade-offs.
